series_metadata.series_description: Various project studies conducted on classifications, placements in specific positions, promotions, salaries, and lay -offs to analyze trends and improve HR operations and assistance to employees.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until superseded,obsolete or replaced, thendestroy. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded,obsolete or replaced, thendestroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
